Download: Video (MP4) | Audio (M4A)
Action Step: Download the worksheet and write out a few examples of how
you could design your environment to promote your habit. You want more
steps between you and a negative behavior, and fewer steps between you and a
positive behavior.

Action Step: Download the worksheet and ask yourself the following: How do
you currently go about the behavior? What are the distractions that pull you off
course? How can you re-design your environment to minimize those
distractions?

Action Step: List 10 examples of how you can step into the flow of your
